instruction: Help me summarize the annual KPI results

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Metric'
ws['B1'] = 'Target'
ws['C1'] = 'Actual'
ws['D1'] = 'Achievement(%)'
ws['A2'] = 'Revenue(10K CNY)'
ws['B2'] = 5000
ws['C2'] = 5280
ws['D2'] = 105.6
ws['A3'] = 'Net Profit(10K CNY)'
ws['B3'] = 800
ws['C3'] = 752
ws['D3'] = 94.0
ws['A4'] = 'New Clients'
ws['B4'] = 200
ws['C4'] = 235
ws['D4'] = 117.5
ws['A5'] = 'Customer Satisfaction(%)'
ws['B5'] = 90
ws['C5'] = 93.2
ws['D5'] = 103.6
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/annual_kpi.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me summarize the annual KPI results

Find the metric with the highest over-achievement rate from /home/user/Desktop/annual_kpi.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/kpi_summary.txt: 'Highest Over-achievement: New Clients (Achievement 117.5%)', save
